speaker: narrator
text: Tap the text to show or hide reading controls.

speaker: narrator
text: Jong Rigok stared at the sparring stage with terrifying eyes.

speaker: narrator
text: It hurt his eyes to watch his disciples enter the ring and carry out Jong Seo-Han.

speaker: narrator
text: He cursed inside.

speaker: narrator
text: He knew he wasn’t supposed to be exposing his emotions like this, but he couldn’t hold back his anger anymore.

speaker: narrator
text: He trembled, clenching his fist tightly, making his nails dig into his palms.

speaker: narrator
text: The audience continued to cheer.

speaker: narrator
text: The fact that the Southern Edge Sect was defeated by Mount Hua in the last conference between the two sects wasn’t too well known.

speaker: narrator
text: The cheers then weren’t for Mount Hua’s win, but for the disgrace that Southern Edge had faced.

speaker: narrator
text: However, that was then, and there were only a few witnesses there.

speaker: narrator
text: With only a few witnesses, many were unsure of how true the rumors were.

speaker: narrator
text: But now, so many people have witnessed their defeat.

speaker: narrator
text: If all of them just said one thing about the Southern Edge Sect losing, then the whole world would learn the truth.

speaker: narrator
text: And there was one more thing that angered him so much, That sword technique.

speaker: narrator
text: The sword technique that had defeated Jong Seo-Han.

speaker: narrator
text: Wasn’t it very similar to the Twelve Movement Snow Flower Sword Technique that the Southern Edge Sect had created with their heart and soul?

speaker: narrator
text: ‘How did they restore it?!

speaker: narrator
text: No one who knows it should be left on Mount Hua!’ That sword technique was like a new symbol of Mount Hua!

speaker: hyun jong
text: “… Twenty-Four Movement Plum Blossom Sword Technique.”

speaker: narrator
text: A voice that sounded like a groan came from Abbot’s mouth, making everyone turn to him.

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Amitabha Buddha. Mount Hua’s sect leader. Is that the martial arts you recovered?”

speaker: narrator
text: The abbot was wide-eyed as he looked at Hyun Jong.

speaker: narrator
text: He was really shocked.

speaker: hyun jong
text: “It was heartbreaking to hear that Mount Hua had lost its sword technique, but you have successfully restored it. This calls for a celebration!”

speaker: baek cheon
text: “No, that isn’t completely true. Fortunately, we were able to recover the books left behind by our ancestors.”

speaker: baek cheon
text: “Indeed. I thoUght that the growth in Mount Hua had to have a reason. There should be something greater about it. If the Twenty-Four Movement Plum Blossom Sword Technique is restored, who can ignore Mount Hua now?”

speaker: narrator
text: At the abbot’s words, Hyun Jong kept a calm expression.

speaker: narrator
text: To be honest, the words of the abbot weren’t completely true.

speaker: narrator
text: The growth of Mount Hua hadn’t started from the sword technique, it had started before; the technique just helped them leap ahead.

speaker: narrator
text: But there was no need to clarify that to these people.

speaker: hyun jong
text: “I am satisfied in recovering the sword technique of my ancestors. And…”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong looked at the stage, and he looked at the face of Jong Rigok, who had been stiff for some time.

speaker: hyun jong
text: “If I can get good results throUgh it, I wouldn’t ask for anything more.”

speaker: narrator
text: The Twenty-Four Movement Plum Blossom Sword Technique.

speaker: narrator
text: The symbol of Mount Hua and the sword technique that had made the Southern Edge Sect terrified of them for years!

speaker: narrator
text: And to make matters much worse, Mount Hua’s recovered sword technique had completely shattered the sword technique of the Southern Edge Sect.

speaker: narrator
text: ’The Twelve Movement Snow Flower technique is a further developed sword technique than the Twenty-Four Movement Plum Blossom Sword technique.

speaker: narrator
text: If used properly, it can defeat even the sword technique of Mount Hua!’ But the results were the opposite.

speaker: narrator
text: Jong Seo-Han had a good understanding of his sword technique, and he wasn’t inferior to Baek Cheon in any way.

speaker: narrator
text: Yet, the child failed to show his strength and was horribly defeated.

speaker: narrator
text: Jong Rigok bit his lip and looked at Jin Geum-Ryong.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘You can never be defeated.’ Jong Seo-Han could lose.

speaker: narrator
text: However, if Jin Geum-Ryong was defeated, that changed everything.

speaker: narrator
text: The instant that he lost, the Southern Edge Sect would be moved below Mount Hua.

speaker: narrator
text: And he couldn’t stand that humiliation.

speaker: narrator
text: Baek Cheon wasn’t all the threats they had, right?

speaker: narrator
text: Jong Rigok looked at Chung Myung.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘Mount Hua’s Divine Dragon.’ And everyone else from Mount Hua could be considered strong enoUgh to be just below Baek Cheon.

speaker: narrator
text: A chill passed throUgh the chest of Jong Rigok.

speaker: narrator
text: Now, he might be watching the moment that Mount Hua overtook Southern Edge.

speaker: narrator
text: Something he would never want to admit.

speaker: narrator
text: It passed across his face sharply.

speaker: narrator
text: The tip of the staff skimmed Jo Gul’s cheek, and he could feel the sharp sting, but Jo Gul didn’t waver.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘Faster and stronger!’ His opponent’s style was sharp and fast.

speaker: narrator
text: It was different from those he had experienced up till now during the preliminary rounds.

speaker: narrator
text: But it wasn’t to a point where he couldn’t handle this.

speaker: narrator
text: In terms of sharpness, the sword of Yoon Jong was sharper, Yu sago had a more delicate sword.

speaker: narrator
text: The overall level of Baek Cheon was higher than these two.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘Chung Myung doesn’t even have to be mentioned.’ Once again, Jo Gul understood what kind of people he had been learning with.

speaker: narrator
text: He would have never understood this if he had been training alone.

speaker: narrator
text: He was able to rise to this level because of the spars between him and his sahyungs, and there were people who reached out to him, and he would help them in turn.

speaker: narrator
text: Jo Gul clenched his teeth.

speaker: narrator
text: His chest felt cold, and his head even colder!

speaker: narrator
text: Jo Gul’s plum blossom.

speaker: narrator
text: It was different from that of Chung Myung, and it was also different from Baek Cheon’s.

speaker: narrator
text: Plum blossoms bloom at the peak of Mount Hua.

speaker: narrator
text: If everyone of them was different, then how could the plum blossoms of this technique be any different?

speaker: narrator
text: A plum that cannot hold its color and seeks after another is as good as dead.

speaker: narrator
text: Those words he had heard countless times.

speaker: narrator
text: The ones that had been nailed into his bones!

speaker: narrator
text: His plum blossoms wrapped around the flying rod, which wanted to pierce the sun.

speaker: narrator
text: The moment the plum blossom and the rod collided, the sound of metal hitting wood could be heard.

speaker: narrator
text: Suddenly, the rod bounced off.

speaker: narrator
text: Jo Gul did not miss it.

speaker: narrator
text: Sword qi flashed up in a single ray of light shining throUgh the plum blossom petals.

speaker: narrator
text: The Beggars Union’s disciple slumped down from what hit his chest.

speaker: chung myung
text: “This match is the victory of Mount Hua’s Jo Gul!”

speaker: narrator
text: And Jo Gul Swung his sword and sheathed it.

speaker: narrator
text: And with that, he came down from the stage.

speaker: narrator
text: By then, the audience was cheering again.

speaker: narrator
text: Some gulped while others said,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Here too! Mount Hua is still winning?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “No. Isn’t this different? Now there are only a hundred people left, and after today it will be sixty-four of them. Even now, most of the disciples are from Mount Hua.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “If Mount Hua wins, it is going to be a huge thing. It will be absurd.”

speaker: narrator
text: The audience couldn’t keep silent and looked at the place where the Mount Hua disciples were gathered.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘Winning this competition?’ Before, they were using it as a joke, but now it couldn’t be considered one.

speaker: narrator
text: If Mount Hua did win this competition, that would be the biggest event of the past ten years.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘Isn’t this a huge deal?’ Mount Hua was the sect that had been pushed out of the Nine Great Sect One Union a few decades ago.

speaker: narrator
text: Such strong disciples appearing now and winning this competition, all the while defeating the most prominent and notable disciples… wasn’t that too amazing?

speaker: narrator
text: Then, it would prove that the eyes of the sects who had dispelled them in the past were all wrong!

speaker: narrator
text: From the point of view of the Nine Great Sects, such a thing couldn’t happen.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Actually. Haven’t they already proven it to some extent? Who can deny that Mount Hua doesn’t deserve to be part of the Nine Great Sects just because they failed a little?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Isn’t that too much? But still, they seemed like good warriors.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Will the experienced ones live for ten thousand years or what? Even if the strong ones are strong, is there any guarantee that Mount Hua will fail to try and become the Best Sect in the World?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Then doesn’t this mean that the Nine Great Sects One Union will become idiots who kicked out a strong sect from their midst? Am I wrong?”

speaker: narrator
text: This was too blasphemous for them to answer, and they were concerned about the eyes and ears of the higher sects listening to them.

speaker: narrator
text: But even they were thinking the same inside.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘They must be so embarrassed.’ ‘I need to look at their faces.’ Most of them here knew it.

speaker: narrator
text: Actually, this competition was being held to show off their wealth.

speaker: narrator
text: Internally, they have been promoting this in the name of forming relationships, and externally to show off their power.

speaker: narrator
text: At the same time, it was clear that the purpose was to solidify their leadership.

speaker: narrator
text: But with Mount Hua coming in, the situation had changed.

speaker: narrator
text: What if Mount Hua won?

speaker: narrator
text: ‘It is going to be like Mount Hua gulping down their hopes.’ The eyes of the people began to twitch.

speaker: narrator
text: A sight they would never get to see in their lifetime, something that only happened once in all of history.

speaker: narrator
text: The desire to see such a moment had spread throUgh the audience.

speaker: narrator
text: And Chung Myung, who was watching it, smiled.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘Is the play being laid out well?’ This was the reason why he had insisted on getting a gold letter for this competition: to get another person to participate from their sect.

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung’s victory?

speaker: narrator
text: Sure, that sounds nice.

speaker: narrator
text: However, wouldn’t it be disappointing to return with a title just for him, when Mount Hua was also growing steadily?

speaker: narrator
text: To those gathered here, he had to show the strength of Mount Hua and not just his personal strength.

speaker: narrator
text: It would show them strength, but also give them a different impression of Mount Hua, which had finally been pulled from its slumber.

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung looked up.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘I will be able to hit those Nine Sects bastards with that.’ He probably could not spectate the spar in a comfortable manner anymore.

speaker: chung myung
text: “It has been friendly till now.”

speaker: narrator
text: I will make you feel like your blood is drying up, so wait.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Disciple Chung Myung. The money…”

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung smiled and ran from his place as he took a new sack and swept the results in,

speaker: chung myung
text: “I like that it is so heavy!”

speaker: narrator
text: Excitedly, he picked up the sack again…

speaker: chung myung
text: “The next match is Southern Edge’s Jin Geum-Ryong and Qingcheng…”

speaker: chung myung
text: “10,000 on Jin Geum-Ryong!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “The next match is between Namgung Family’s Do Wei…”

speaker: chung myung
text: “10,000 on Namgung Family…”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Mount Hua’s Yoon Jong…”

speaker: chung myung
text: “50,000 on Yoon Jong!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “50,000 on Yu Yiseol.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “30,000 on Baek Gong!”

speaker: narrator
text: The sacks kept piling up like mountains behind Chung Myung, making everyone shocked.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘He got it all right?’ ‘At this point, doesn’t it look like manipulation?’ Some were suspicious of it and couldn’t trust these results.

speaker: narrator
text: Predicting the outcome of the match?

speaker: narrator
text: It wasn’t a difficult thing.

speaker: narrator
text: If the people here were asked to predict the match with their fortunes on the line, they would confidently do so.

speaker: narrator
text: But the problem was the 50/50s.

speaker: narrator
text: There was always a chance of them getting it wrong, but there were matches that were complete 50/50s.

speaker: narrator
text: And that was normal.

speaker: narrator
text: If one could know the outcome of a match before it started, why ask for a match at all?

speaker: narrator
text: The sacks of money behind Chung Myung proved this.

speaker: narrator
text: There was a proud smile that he couldn’t hide as the pile kept growing.

speaker: narrator
text: They had no choice but to watch as their money left their hands and went into the pocket of another man.

speaker: narrator
text: And their eyes turned harsh.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Next is Mount Hua’s Tang Soso and Southern Edge…”

speaker: narrator
text: Before Wei Lishan could even finish his sentence, the gamblers jumped in,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Me, 2,000 on Tang Soso!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Don’t tell me you didn’t see? I mean, Mount Hua has won every single one of their matches till now! Besides, isn’t that person from Mount Hua? Until now, every disciple from Mount Hua has done well!”

speaker: narrator
text: Realizing that they would lose if they reversed the bet, they poured their money on Tang Soso.

speaker: narrator
text: They wanted to earn money in a steady pattern like Chung Myung.

speaker: narrator
text: In an instant, money piled up on the side of Tang Soso.

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung smiled at this,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Now that your eyes are all open.”

speaker: narrator
text: Everyone who heard this sighed.

speaker: chung myung
text: “But the play has tilted a little.”

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung began to collect the money slips from the sack.

speaker: narrator
text: He threw it on the opposite side,

speaker: chung myung
text: “150k on Lee Song-Baek of Southern Edge.”

speaker: narrator
text: The gamblers looked at Chung Myung with trembling eyes.

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung just shrugged his shoulders, The eyes of the men turned teary-eyed.

speaker: narrator
text: Return of the Mount Hua Sect
